anchor: Who took the most leaves last month?
positives: [TABLE] tabLeave Application | desc: Stores leave requests from employees. Used to count the number of leaves taken by each employee.
[FIELD] employee | [TABLE] tabLeave Application | desc: Identifies the employee who applied for leave. Grouped to calculate total leaves per employee.
[FIELD] from_date | [TABLE] tabLeave Application | desc: Represents the start date of the leave. Filtered to match the last month time range.
[FIELD] to_date | [TABLE] tabLeave Application | desc: Represents the end date of the leave. Filtered to match the last month time range.
[FIELD] status | [TABLE] tabLeave Application | desc: Indicates the status of the leave application. Filtered to include only approved leaves.

anchor: How many employees haven't logged their hours for more than a week?
positives: [TABLE] tabTimesheet | desc: Records the time logged by employees for tasks. Used to check the last time log entry for each employee.
[FIELD] employee | [TABLE] tabTimesheet | desc: Identifies the employee who logged the time. Grouped to find the latest time log per employee.
[FIELD] start_time | [TABLE] tabTimesheet | desc: Represents the start time of the logged task. Used to find the latest time log per employee.
[FIELD] status | [TABLE] tabTimesheet | desc: Indicates the status of the time log. Filtered to include only submitted time logs.

anchor: Who's due for a performance review next week?
positives: [TABLE] tabAppraisal | desc: Stores performance reviews for employees. Used to find upcoming performance reviews.
[FIELD] employee | [TABLE] tabAppraisal | desc: Identifies the employee being reviewed. Used to list employees with upcoming reviews.
[FIELD] start_date | [TABLE] tabAppraisal | desc: Represents the start date of the review period. Filtered to match the next week time range.
[FIELD] end_date | [TABLE] tabAppraisal | desc: Represents the end date of the review period. Filtered to match the next week time range.
[FIELD] status | [TABLE] tabAppraisal | desc: Indicates the status of the review. Filtered to include only pending reviews.
[TABLE] tabTimesheet | desc: Records the time logged by employees for tasks. Used to find overtime work.
[FIELD] employee | [TABLE] tabTimesheet | desc: Identifies the employee who logged the time. Used to list employees who worked overtime.
[FIELD] start_time | [TABLE] tabTimesheet | desc: Represents the start time of the logged task. Filtered to match last Saturday.
[FIELD] end_time | [TABLE] tabTimesheet | desc: Represents the end time of the logged task. Used to calculate overtime hours.
[FIELD] status | [TABLE] tabTimesheet | desc: Indicates the status of the time log. Filtered to include only submitted time logs.

anchor: Who's the top salesperson this year?
positives: [TABLE] tabSales Order | desc: Records sales transactions made to customers. Used to calculate sales volume per salesperson.
[FIELD] sales_person | [TABLE] tabSales Order | desc: Links each sales order to a specific salesperson. Grouped to compute total sales per salesperson.
[FIELD] grand_total | [TABLE] tabSales Order | desc: Stores the monetary value of each sales order. Summed to determine total sales and rank salespersons by volume.
[FIELD] transaction_date | [TABLE] tabSales Order | desc: Represents the date of the sales order. Filtered to match the current year time range.

anchor: Who didn't show up for work yesterday?
positives: [TABLE] tabAttendance | desc: Records employee attendance. Used to find employees who were absent.
[FIELD] employee | [TABLE] tabAttendance | desc: Identifies the employee. Used to list employees who were absent.
[FIELD] status | [TABLE] tabAttendance | desc: Indicates the attendance status of the employee. Filtered to include only 'Absent' status.
[FIELD] attendance_date | [TABLE] tabAttendance | desc: Represents the date of attendance. Filtered to match yesterday.
[TABLE] tabEmployee | desc: Stores employee details. Used to find the most recently hired employee.
[FIELD] name | [TABLE] tabEmployee | desc: Identifies the employee. Used to display the name of the newest hire.
[FIELD] date_of_joining | [TABLE] tabEmployee | desc: Represents the date the employee joined the company. Sorted to find the most recent date.

anchor: Who's not submitted their expense claims for last month?
positives: [TABLE] tabExpense Claim | desc: Stores expense claims made by employees. Used to find pending expense claims.
[FIELD] employee | [TABLE] tabExpense Claim | desc: Identifies the employee who made the claim. Used to list employees with pending claims.
[FIELD] posting_date | [TABLE] tabExpense Claim | desc: Represents the date the claim was made. Filtered to match the last month time range.
[FIELD] status | [TABLE] tabExpense Claim | desc: Indicates the status of the claim. Filtered to include only 'Draft' and 'Submitted' statuses.
[TABLE] tabSalary Structure | desc: Stores salary details for employees. Used to find the employee with the highest salary.
[FIELD] employee | [TABLE] tabSalary Structure | desc: Identifies the employee. Used to display the name of the employee with the highest salary.
[FIELD] base | [TABLE] tabSalary Structure | desc: Represents the base salary of the employee. Sorted to find the highest salary.

anchor: Who's been with us the longest?
positives: [TABLE] tabEmployee | desc: Stores employee details. Used to find the longest-serving employee.
[FIELD] name | [TABLE] tabEmployee | desc: Identifies the employee. Used to display the name of the longest-serving employee.
[FIELD] date_of_joining | [TABLE] tabEmployee | desc: Represents the date the employee joined the company. Sorted to find the earliest date.
